seo.title: Vacation Rental Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your vacation rental. Route unhappy guests to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Vacation Rentals
hero.subheading: A great stay doesn’t always become a review. ReviewFlo helps you follow up after checkout.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Vacation Rental Faces

items.heading: Guests leave town without reviewing
items.body: They’re on to the next trip, not your listing.

items.heading: One bad stay can sit at the top
items.body: Cleaning, keys, or accuracy issues can show up online fast.

items.heading: You’re not there to ask in person
items.body: Remote hosting means no natural moment at the door.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Vacation Rentals

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after checkout
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when the stay ends.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star guests go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Built for remote hosts
items.body: Follow up by text or email after every stay.

items.heading: Private feedback first
items.body: You can address issues before they become public reviews.

items.heading: Same link for every booking
items.body: Drop it into your checkout message or guest guide.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will guests leave reviews for short-term rentals?
items.a: Yes, when you ask right after checkout while the stay is fresh.

items.q: What if a guest is unhappy?
items.a: They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.
No. It’s a link by text or email.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small operators.

items.q: Can I use this for multiple properties?
items.a: Yes. Use separate links per property if you want feedback organized by unit.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Vacation Rental Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
